title: Daoist Canon: Sun Buer: Female Alchemy (Section 7)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Sun Buer: Female Alchemy
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Sun Buer: Female Alchemy

translation.text: From the Sun Buer: Female Alchemy of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
